episodes.title: Detecting B.S. in the Age of Cults, Pseudosciences, & Swindlers: Cognitive Bias & Beyond #psychology
episodes.description:
Today I welcome Dr. Laith Al-Shawaf on to talk about the role cognitive biases play in the way we view the world, psychology vs. "woo" New age practices, what makes a person susceptible to falling prey to predatorial practices, and red flags or warning signs you're dealing with plain ol' B.S. Connect with Dr. Al-Shawaf by following him on Twitter: @laithalshawaf and read his latest (and previous!) publications:  https://areomagazine.com/author/laithalshawaf/ or  https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/blog/six-impossible-things-breakfast! 

Plus: Read the article that inspired today's interview!: https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/blog/six-impossible-things-breakfast/202110/detecting-bullit

🌻Mental Health Merch: https://dine-in-psychology.creator-spring.com/
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/dineinpsychology 
Book: https://www.amazon.com/Live-Learn-Love-Real-talk-woman-ebook/dp/B07NJBLLSB 

CHAPTERS:
00:00 Introduction
01:54 Meet Laith + Why are Cognitive Biases important to know about?
03:04 What is a cognitive bias? Let's talk confirmation bias.
05:32 How does a cognitive bias come to be?
06:44 What is woo? New age fluffy spiritual practices discussed.
07:26 The Promise of Success and Hope as the Hook in New Age practices
08:05 Is Woo harmless? What's the Harm?!
10:25 How do cultic groups come into play here?
11:03 What makes a person more susceptible than others?
12:52 Development of Cults and Manipulation that can happen: Cultural Disillusionment
13:44  "It would never happen to me!" How to stay aware of predatory practices
17:12 The HOT SPOTS of Woo: What is The Secret and beyond?
22:05 Red Flags to KNOW when looking for healing: Too good to be true + "give me your money!"
25:02 Pull Out! Financial Exploitation and the Sunk Cost Fallacy
26:55 Is Psychology a Pseudoscience? 
31:21 The Key Differences Between Psychology and Woo: Look for the evidence
33:35 Do emotions trump research? Sample size of 1 & Critical Thinking skill development
35:56 The Power of Belief + Rigorous Research
38:15 What's the deal with anecdotal advice?
40:38 James Randi the Famous Magician and Debunker's Experiment
43:55 Final Thoughts + Words of Wisdom
46:20 Staying Open Minded but Vigilant
47:00 Upcoming publications/projects: Connect with Laith!

#psychologicalcommentary #pseudoscience #psychological #cognitivebias #manipulation #cultsandextremebeliefs #cults #therapist #analysis #indoctrination #personalitydevelopment #personality #predators #antiscam #antimlm
